title: Y School Heroes
subTitle: The YSP Club tackle many mysteries at the super elite school Y Academy.

title: Black Clover
subTitle: In a magical world, Asta and Yuno, two childhood friends, keep their promise and battle against each other to win the title of Emperor Magnus.

subTitle: Tohru Honda, a high school student, starts living with the Sohma family and discovers an unusual curse that has been cast upon them.

title: D.Gray-man
subTitle: Allen Walker joins the Black Order and trains intensively in order to become an exorcist and take down Millennium Earl. He must race against time before the villain uses his lethal weapon, the Akuma.

title: Fruits Basket
subTitle: Tohru and the crew have some fun at the department store as the summer break starts. Meanwhile, Uotani meets someone who reminds her of Tohru.

title: Fruits Basket
subTitle: Momiji invites Tohru and the Somas to the vacation house by the ocean for a holiday, but Tohru has to finish her homework first.
